channel.title: openapi-spec Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the openapi-spec codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: SpecificationTooling Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: The infrastructure supporting the distribution and validation of the API spec. Architectural overview of the SpecificationTooling domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SupermodelAPI Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: The primary interface for Supermodel's public services and data extraction endpoints. Architectural overview of the SupermodelAPI domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.description: Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
